/usr/bin/cc -g CMakeFiles/transcriber.dir/src/app_controller.c.o CMakeFiles/transcriber.dir/src/app_window.c.o CMakeFiles/transcriber.dir/src/app_dbus.c.o CMakeFiles/transcriber.dir/src/app_tray.c.o CMakeFiles/transcriber.dir/src/main.c.o CMakeFiles/transcriber.dir/src/app_audio.c.o CMakeFiles/transcriber.dir/src/app_whisper.c.o CMakeFiles/transcriber.dir/src/app_config.c.o CMakeFiles/transcriber.dir/src/app_config_dialog.c.o CMakeFiles/transcriber.dir/src/app_clipboard.c.o -o transcriber  -lgtk-3 -lgdk-3 -lz -lpangocairo-1.0 -lpango-1.0 -lharfbuzz -latk-1.0 -lcairo-gobject -lcairo -lgdk_pixbuf-2.0 -lgio-2.0 -lgobject-2.0 -lglib-2.0 -lasound -lcurl -ldbus-1 -lcjson -layatana-appindicator3 -layatana-indicator3 -layatana-ido3-0.4 -ldbusmenu-glib -lgtk-3 -lgdk-3 -lz -lpangocairo-1.0 -lpango-1.0 -lharfbuzz -latk-1.0 -lcairo-gobject -lcairo -lgdk_pixbuf-2.0 -lgio-2.0 -lgobject-2.0 -lglib-2.0 -lpthread -lm -lasound -lcurl -ldbus-1 -lcjson -layatana-appindicator3 -layatana-indicator3 -layatana-ido3-0.4 -ldbusmenu-glib -lpthread -lm
